name: BillingDisputes
description: bill too high, why is there a charge of XX on my bill, overcharge

sampleUtterances.utterance: I'm disputing the {disputeFeeType} fee on my bill
Why have I been charged a {disputeFeeType} fee?
Remove the {disputeFeeType} charge from my account
There's a {disputeFeeType} charge on my bill that shouldn't be there
I never agreed to a {disputeFeeType} fee
I want to challenge the {disputeFeeType} charge on my latest bill
Can you explain why I've been charged for {disputeFeeType} when I shouldn't have been?
The {disputeFeeType} fee is incorrect and I want it removed
I was told I wouldn't be charged for {disputeFeeType} but it's on my bill
I've been billed twice this month — there's a {disputeFeeType} on there that's a duplicate
How do I dispute a {disputeFeeType} charge?
That {disputeFeeType} charge needs to come off my bill
I'm seeing a fee for {disputeFeeType} that I didn't expect
I signed up on the basis there would be no {disputeFeeType} fee
My bill has gone up because of a {disputeFeeType} charge I don't recognise
Take the {disputeFeeType} fee off please
I've already paid the {disputeFeeType} but it's showing up again
Why is there a charge on my bill I never authorised?

Dispute a fee on my account
